positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene. A stylized group of overlapping polygonal trees and abstracted leaves forming a dense yet open forest pattern. The aesthetic should be inspired by modern Nordic design and vaporwave palettes, using contrasting shades of deep indigo blue, ethereal pale cyan, and vibrant emerald green against a creamy off-white background. Focus on strong, graphic silhouettes and clean, sharp edges. The composition should be perfectly centered and repeatable, optimized for large textile printing. Use negative space dramatically to enhance the clean, crisp quality.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, gradient, noise, grain, bad anatomy, low resolution, cluttered, dirty, excessive detail, photorealistic, 3d render, comic book style
